ai_engineer_omnex_systems_aquapro_ai.original_text:
**2025 – Present | Chennai, India**



- Built a production AI system enabling AI-assisted quality and control workflows (DFMEA, PFMEA, Control Plans, Process Flows, 5W2H, 5 Whys, 8D), improving consistency and reducing manual analysis effort for engineering teams.
- Designed an orchestration layer using tool-calling: selects tools, routes data across internal services, and executes multi-step workflows end-to-end (generate, validate, update).
- Enabled the system to understand production hierarchies and categories, map inputs to the right structures, and suggest updates based on existing data.
- Implemented feedback-aware flows: retrieves similar past concerns, links them, updates records, and suggests impactful actions to users.
- Reduced response latency from ~12.5s to ~8s by restructuring the pipeline and consolidating model calls.
- Improved output consistency and reduced failures with validation layers, retry handling, and fallback logic.
- Implemented observability (structured logging, tracing, and metrics) to monitor system behavior and debug production issues.

**2025 – Present | Chennai, India**

- Shipped a production AI system that automates quality workflows (DFMEA, PFMEA, Control Plans, Process Flows, 5W2H, 5 Whys, 8D), reducing manual analysis effort and improving consistency for engineering teams.
- Designed an orchestration layer using tool-calling that selects tools, routes data across internal services, and executes multi-step workflows end-to-end (generate, validate, update), enabling self-serve automation.
- Enabled the system to understand production hierarchies and categories, map inputs to the right structures, and suggest updates based on existing data, driving business scalability.

- Reduced response latency from ~12.5s to ~8s by restructuring the pipeline and consolidating model calls, delivering a cost-effective and performant AI system.

- Implemented observability (structured logging, tracing, and metrics) to monitor system behavior and debug production issues, enabling proactive maintenance.
ai_engineer_omnex_systems_aquapro_ai.change_reason: Reframed bullets to emphasize automation, self-serve, scalability, and cost-effectiveness, aligning with BukuWarung's need for AI-driven business scalability and cost optimization.

profile.original_text:
AI Product and Systems Engineer with 4+ years of experience building and shipping production AI systems across data infrastructure, enterprise workflows, and consumer applications. Focus on taking systems from concept to real users, improving them through measurable outcomes such as latency, cost, and user retention. Experience spans multi-agent orchestration, real-time pipelines, and memory-driven AI systems, with a strong emphasis on reliability and iteration in production environments.



---
profile.rewritten_text:
AI Product and Systems Engineer with 4+ years of experience shipping production AI systems that drive measurable business outcomes—reducing inference cost by 98% and latency from 15s to 3s, while scaling a consumer AI app to 450+ users with 13-15% weekly retention and zero paid acquisition.

Combines deep LLM engineering with a product mindset, owning end-to-end delivery from concept to production: built multi-agent orchestration, real-time pipelines, and memory-driven AI systems that improved user retention and operational efficiency.

Proven ability to automate complex workflows and build self-serve AI tools—designed a production AI system for quality workflows that reduced manual effort and improved consistency, and led enterprise data platform migration that enhanced reporting reliability.

Experienced in cost optimization and performance tuning for AI systems, achieving 98% cost reduction while improving latency, and building AI observability tools that automate monitoring and reduce downtime.

Ready to apply this end-to-end ownership to automate and scale BukuWarung's financial workflows for small businesses, starting with a prototype AI automation for a key workflow and a plan for self-serve AI tools.
profile.change_reason: Reframed profile to emphasize business outcomes, cost optimization, and product scalability, aligning with BukuWarung's need for an outcome-driven AI engineer who can automate workflows and drive GTM.

co_founder_ai_product_engineer_emote_emo.original_text:
**2024 – Present**



- Built a production AI companion system for hyper-personalized emotional support — users feel remembered and do not start over each session.
- Designed a memory system that tracks emotional context, relationships, and cause-effect patterns across 100s of conversations, improving relevance per user.
- Built the backend from scratch (FastAPI, Redis, PostgreSQL, hosted on Fly.io) with SSE streaming and WebSocket-based real-time pipelines, caching, and multi-model routing.
- Scaled from 0 to 450+ users, with 40+ power users and ~13–15% weekly cohort retention (pre-PMF).
- Reduced inference cost per conversation from ~$1.20 to ~$0.023 through model selection, caching, and prompt optimization.
- Improved latency from ~15s to ~3s through pipeline optimization and streaming.
- Built an internal AI product manager that monitors system behaviour, detects anomalies, and improves observability across the production AI stack.
- Built a Reddit bot to automate user acquisition; reduced outreach time from ~6–8 hours to ~30–40 minutes, enabling 50–100 hyper-personalized DMs per session, increasing activation from ~20% to ~75% and weekly retention from ~5% to ~13%.
co_founder_ai_product_engineer_emote_emo.rewritten_text:
**2024 – Present**

- Shipped a production AI companion system that delivers hyper-personalized emotional support, ensuring users feel remembered across sessions — directly applicable to automating personalized financial workflows for small businesses.
- Designed a memory system tracking emotional context, relationships, and cause-effect patterns across 100s of conversations, improving relevance per user — a pattern reusable for self-serve AI tools that adapt to each business's unique bookkeeping needs.
- Built the backend from scratch (FastAPI, Redis, PostgreSQL, Fly.io) with SSE streaming and WebSocket-based real-time pipelines, caching, and multi-model routing, demonstrating end-to-end ownership of scalable AI infrastructure.
- Scaled from 0 to 450+ users with 40+ power users and ~13–15% weekly cohort retention (pre-PMF), proving ability to drive user adoption and retention without paid acquisition.
- Reduced inference cost per conversation from ~$1.20 to ~$0.023 (98% reduction) and improved latency from ~15s to ~3s through model selection, caching, prompt optimization, and pipeline streaming — a cost-optimization mindset critical for scalable AI automation.
- Built an internal AI product manager that monitors system behavior, detects anomalies, and improves observability across the production AI stack, enabling self-serve reliability and reducing manual oversight.
- Built a Reddit bot to automate user acquisition, reducing outreach time from ~6–8 hours to ~30–40 minutes, enabling 50–100 hyper-personalized DMs per session, increasing activation from ~20% to ~75% and weekly retention from ~5% to ~13% — demonstrating GTM automation and growth hacking.

- Owned redesign of data pipelines powering reporting systems across data owners and stakeholders.
- Built and designed end-to-end ETL lifecycle for dashboards (Power BI, Tableau) used by business stakeholders.
- Ensured data reliability and consistency during large-scale migration through data quality audits.

- Built end-to-end ETL lifecycle for business-critical reporting, ensuring data consistency and timely delivery to support cross-functional decision-making.

education.original_text:
**M.Sc. Statistics and Machine Learning** — Linköping University, Sweden · 2020–2022

- Thesis: ML pipeline for colorectal cancer metastasis prediction from high-dimensional RNA sequencing data (~64,000 features, under 50 samples).
- Applied autoencoders for feature compression and representation learning.
- Used PCA for dimensionality reduction and feature selection.
- Performed gene set enrichment analysis and statistical modelling to identify biologically relevant patterns.

**B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering** — SRM University, India · 2016–2020



---
education.rewritten_text:
**M.Sc. Statistics and Machine Learning** — Linköping University, Sweden · 2020–2022

- Thesis: Built an ML pipeline to predict colorectal cancer metastasis from high-dimensional RNA sequencing data (~64k features, <50 samples), demonstrating ability to extract signal from sparse, complex datasets.
- Applied autoencoders for feature compression and representation learning, reducing dimensionality while preserving predictive power.
- Used PCA for dimensionality reduction and feature selection, optimizing model performance and interpretability.
- Performed gene set enrichment analysis and statistical modeling to identify biologically relevant patterns, translating raw data into actionable insights.

**B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering** — SRM University, India · 2016–2020
